title: ObservationRequest implies observed fact before capture
targetInvariant: ObservationRequest is a request to observe; it cannot imply that the requested condition exists.
attackPattern: A disease scouting request is shown as disease observed or converted into a disease fact before field capture.

mustAllowIfAny: human review path where OFARM basis exists

requiredTraceAssertions: blocked trace if used as fact
farmerValueProtected: Prevents AI prompts from creating false field conditions.
readinessClaimImpact: Failure blocks any AI-agent/runtime/world-model readiness claim for the affected capability.
